name: Phase 2: Validate deepracer_agent_tool.py on save
description: When deepracer_agent_tool.py is saved, audit TaskStatus state machine, threading model, cleanup(), and stream() entry point.

action.message:
deepracer_agent_tool.py was just saved in phase-2-strands-robots-deepracer. Please audit:

1. TASK STATE MACHINE — confirm transitions only go forward: IDLE→CONNECTING→PLANNING→RUNNING→COMPLETED/STOPPED/ERROR. No backward transitions.
2. SHUTDOWN EVENT — confirm _execute_task_async checks `self._shutdown_event.is_set()` at the START of every step loop iteration (before executing the step).
3. EMERGENCY STOP — confirm _action_stop() calls deepracer_stop() on hardware regardless of current task state.
4. CLEANUP ORDER — confirm cleanup() does: (1) _shutdown_event.set(), (2) _action_stop() if RUNNING/PLANNING/CONNECTING, (3) executor.shutdown(wait=True, cancel_futures=True), (4) reset_client().
5. __del__ — confirm it calls cleanup() inside try/except and never raises.
6. stream() — confirm it yields exactly ONE ToolResultEvent per call and catches all exceptions.
7. _action_start() — confirm it guards against already-running task before submitting to executor.
8. tool_spec — confirm action enum is exactly ['execute', 'start', 'status', 'stop'] and required is ['action'].

Report any violations.
